accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text across all three titles.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; mentions Section 230 non-alteration which is an accurate fact about the bill not explicitly in the excerpt but is a real provision.

effective_dates.why: Notes 18-month effective date for Title I algorithm provisions take effect after one year.

correct_entities.why: FTC, COPPA, and other entities correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: 18-month effective date and 1-year algorithm provision date correctly stated.
